records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Administration Direct Control City, <color=#ffd34c>Charade</color> Center of the Grand Dimension Crevice
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Administration Direct Control City, <color=#ffd34c>Charade</color> Center of the Grand Dimension Crevice
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Administration Direct Control City, <color=#ffd34c>Charade</color> Center of the Grand Dimension Crevice

records.m_Talk_ENG: So this is the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So this is the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So this is the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I prepared for the pilgrimage, following the guidance of revelation, and poured so much time and effort into it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I prepared for the pilgrimage, following the guidance of revelation, and poured so much time and effort into it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I prepared for the pilgrimage, following the guidance of revelation, and poured so much time and effort into it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And this is how it ends...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And this is how it ends...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And this is how it ends...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My wounds are not healing anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My wounds are not healing anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My wounds are not healing anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have the Replacer enhancements reached their limit?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have the Replacer enhancements reached their limit?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have the Replacer enhancements reached their limit?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe. Well, if it weren't for this patchwork body, I'd have died screaming long ago...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe. Well, if it weren't for this patchwork body, I'd have died screaming long ago...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. Well, if it weren't for this patchwork body, I'd have died screaming long ago...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heed my call, kin of the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heed my call, kin of the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heed my call, kin of the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The salvation I have been looking for... Was it all for naught?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The salvation I have been looking for... Was it all for naught?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The salvation I have been looking for... Was it all for naught?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believed it was an irreversible fate, so I carried out my design.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believed it was an irreversible fate, so I carried out my design.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believed it was an irreversible fate, so I carried out my design.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The guidance of revelation led me here, and so I could walk any path of thorns.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The guidance of revelation led me here, and so I could walk any path of thorns.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The guidance of revelation led me here, and so I could walk any path of thorns.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now that I've lost the god's vessel, the ritual is no longer possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But now that I've lost the god's vessel, the ritual is no longer possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But now that I've lost the god's vessel, the ritual is no longer possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How utterly futile. Is this pilgrimage to end here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How utterly futile. Is this pilgrimage to end here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How utterly futile. Is this pilgrimage to end here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your Eminence, perhaps I...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your Eminence, perhaps I...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your Eminence, perhaps I...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Father... Constantine...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Father... Constantine...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Father... Constantine...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It really is you, Father Constantine...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It really is you, Father Constantine...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It really is you, Father Constantine...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So it truly is you, Father Constantine...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So it truly is you, Father Constantine...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So it truly is you, Father Constantine...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, was it really you who caused what happened in Charade...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, was it really you who caused what happened in Charade...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, was it really you who caused what happened in Charade...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why would you do something so terrible...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why would you do something so terrible...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why would you do something so terrible...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Claudia... Nelson...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Claudia... Nelson...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Claudia... Nelson...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why... are you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why... are you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why... are you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Answer me! You should have lost your ability and been excluded from the sacred mission. Why are you here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Answer me! You should have lost your ability and been excluded from the sacred mission. Why are you here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Answer me! You should have lost your ability and been excluded from the sacred mission. Why are you here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surely... The Investigation Council said they weren't bringing you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surely... The Investigation Council said they weren't bringing you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surely... The Investigation Council said they weren't bringing you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doubt until thou cannot doubt any more. Cardinal Johan's teaching.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doubt until thou cannot doubt any more. Cardinal Johan's teaching.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doubt until thou cannot doubt any more. Cardinal Johan's teaching.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I came because I wanted to hear it from you, Father. Not from anyone else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I came because I wanted to hear it from you, Father. Not from anyone else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I came because I wanted to hear it from you, Father. Not from anyone else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-hear it from me...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-hear it from me...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-hear it from me...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Father I know would never do something like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Father I know would never do something like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Father I know would never do something like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're kind enough to make gravestones for dead pagans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're kind enough to make gravestones for dead pagans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're kind enough to make gravestones for dead pagans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was sure there had to be some <color=#ffd34c>reason</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was sure there had to be some <color=#ffd34c>reason</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was sure there had to be some <color=#ffd34c>reason</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I still believe that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I still believe that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I still believe that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So please, tell me, Father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So please, tell me, Father.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So please, tell me, Father.

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Do not fear, faithful attendant who follows Him.</color>
records.m_Talk_ENG: Why would you do this... even if it meant being wounded like this?
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Do not fear, faithful attendant who follows Him.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why would you do this... even if it meant being wounded like this?
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Do not fear, faithful attendant who follows Him.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why would you do this... even if it meant being wounded like this?

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: <color=#ff3636>This cup was prepared by the One who watches over the rise and fall of the world, for you blind ones.</color>
records.m_Talk_ENG: Why would you sacrifice others... even if it means being hated by everyone?
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: <color=#ff3636>This cup was prepared by the One who watches over the rise and fall of the world, for you blind ones.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why would you sacrifice others... even if it means being hated by everyone?
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: <color=#ff3636>This cup was prepared by the One who watches over the rise and fall of the world, for you blind ones.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why would you sacrifice others... even if it means being hated by everyone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why... would you abandon your faith in the Lord, and kill His Eminence...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why... would you abandon your faith in the Lord, and kill His Eminence...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why... would you abandon your faith in the Lord, and kill His Eminence...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please answer me, Father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please answer me, Father.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please answer me, Father.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you truly...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you truly...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you truly...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hehe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hehe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hehe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Father Constantine...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Father Constantine...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Father Constantine...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keke! Why?!! Just whyyy...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keke! Why?!! Just whyyy...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keke! Why?!! Just whyyy...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: O God! This fate you have arranged is truly cruel!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O God! This fate you have arranged is truly cruel!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O God! This fate you have arranged is truly cruel!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You saw through my lingering attachment from the very beginning...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You saw through my lingering attachment from the very beginning...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You saw through my lingering attachment from the very beginning...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must have known I was bound by it, enough to prepare another vessel...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must have known I was bound by it, enough to prepare another vessel...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must have known I was bound by it, enough to prepare another vessel...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
And yet you...! You wretched
8g!!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
And yet you...! You wretched
8g!!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
And yet you...! You wretched
8g!!

Is this the contrived tragedy you demand of me 8

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like the one who tried to offer up his own son by his own hand...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like the one who tried to offer up his own son by his own hand...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like the one who tried to offer up his own son by his own hand...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you truly wish me to kill that noble, pure maiden with my own hands, and make her the sacrifice...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you truly wish me to kill that noble, pure maiden with my own hands, and make her the sacrifice...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you truly wish me to kill that noble, pure maiden with my own hands, and make her the sacrifice...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop this at once, betrayer...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop this at once, betrayer...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop this at once, betrayer...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Claudia...? Why are you here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Claudia...? Why are you here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Claudia...? Why are you here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We must stop him. If he goes any further, there'll be no turning back!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We must stop him. If he goes any further, there'll be no turning back!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We must stop him. If he goes any further, there'll be no turning back!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know! Damn it, I know...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know! Damn it, I know...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know! Damn it, I know...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. If this is your trial...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. If this is your trial...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. If this is your trial...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then as you wish, I will become the clown and dance in this ridiculous tragedy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then as you wish, I will become the clown and dance in this ridiculous tragedy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then as you wish, I will become the clown and dance in this ridiculous tragedy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: F-Father...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-Father...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-Father...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to the guidance of revelation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to the guidance of revelation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to the guidance of revelation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With this, I shall bring this long, long pilgrimage to an end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With this, I shall bring this long, long pilgrimage to an end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With this, I shall bring this long, long pilgrimage to an end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No...! Stop! Stop it...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No...! Stop! Stop it...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No...! Stop! Stop it...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Amen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Amen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Amen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Entering safe mode.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Entering safe mode.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Entering safe mode.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Data-corruption firewall active. Limited runtime: 13 seconds.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Data-corruption firewall active. Limited runtime: 13 seconds.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Data-corruption firewall active. Limited runtime: 13 seconds.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Executing contingency protocol for Fate interference - OMEN.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Executing contingency protocol for Fate interference - OMEN.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Executing contingency protocol for Fate interference - OMEN.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Loading memories stored on this Terrabrain terminal.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Loading memories stored on this Terrabrain terminal.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Loading memories stored on this Terrabrain terminal.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Omen Protocol <color=#ffd34c>Activated</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: Omen Protocol <color=#ffd34c>Activated</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: Omen Protocol <color=#ffd34c>Activated</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Indeed... It's a bit noisy tonight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Indeed... It's a bit noisy tonight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Indeed... It's a bit noisy tonight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no need to worry. The stage has merely finished Act One.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no need to worry. The stage has merely finished Act One.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no need to worry. The stage has merely finished Act One.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once this intermission ends and the curtain rises on the next act, it will grow far more tumultuous than this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once this intermission ends and the curtain rises on the next act, it will grow far more tumultuous than this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once this intermission ends and the curtain rises on the next act, it will grow far more tumultuous than this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, was it called the <color=#ffd34c>omen</color> phenomenon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, was it called the <color=#ffd34c>omen</color> phenomenon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, was it called the <color=#ffd34c>omen</color> phenomenon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A phenomenon where an unforeseen existence intervenes in reality by unforeseen means.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A phenomenon where an unforeseen existence intervenes in reality by unforeseen means.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A phenomenon where an unforeseen existence intervenes in reality by unforeseen means.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the Old Administration's protocol prepared in response to it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the Old Administration's protocol prepared in response to it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the Old Administration's protocol prepared in response to it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, how does our lovely young lady happen to know such things?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, how does our lovely young lady happen to know such things?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, how does our lovely young lady happen to know such things?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How I know isn't what matters, is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How I know isn't what matters, is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How I know isn't what matters, is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as a character on stage has no need to know what lies beyond it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as a character on stage has no need to know what lies beyond it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as a character on stage has no need to know what lies beyond it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, who knows? I may not know much about the stage, but this is my monastery, you see?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, who knows? I may not know much about the stage, but this is my monastery, you see?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, who knows? I may not know much about the stage, but this is my monastery, you see?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would appreciate it if you observed the appropriate decorum and courtesy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I would appreciate it if you observed the appropriate decorum and courtesy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I would appreciate it if you observed the appropriate decorum and courtesy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gladly, Agnes Abigail.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gladly, Agnes Abigail.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gladly, Agnes Abigail.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is an honor for me as well, to be invited to the Society's estate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is an honor for me as well, to be invited to the Society's estate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is an honor for me as well, to be invited to the Society's estate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even for someone like me, stepping foot here so casually is no easy matter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even for someone like me, stepping foot here so casually is no easy matter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even for someone like me, stepping foot here so casually is no easy matter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An invitation from a dean is the quickest way, after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An invitation from a dean is the quickest way, after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An invitation from a dean is the quickest way, after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my, you make it sound as though you've tried before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my, you make it sound as though you've tried before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my, you make it sound as though you've tried before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? I'd like to hear the real reason you're here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? I'd like to hear the real reason you're here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? I'd like to hear the real reason you're here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My business is quite simple. I would like to cast you in my script.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My business is quite simple. I would like to cast you in my script.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My business is quite simple. I would like to cast you in my script.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, cast me...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, cast me...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, cast me...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not about to ask me to take the stage myself, are you? That sounds like a lot of work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not about to ask me to take the stage myself, are you? That sounds like a lot of work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not about to ask me to take the stage myself, are you? That sounds like a lot of work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not a bad offer for you either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not a bad offer for you either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not a bad offer for you either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: More than anything, I happen to like characters such as yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: More than anything, I happen to like characters such as yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: More than anything, I happen to like characters such as yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those who wear a mask of gentleness, yet are selfish, calculating, and ruthlessly cold beneath it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those who wear a mask of gentleness, yet are selfish, calculating, and ruthlessly cold beneath it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those who wear a mask of gentleness, yet are selfish, calculating, and ruthlessly cold beneath it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, is that supposed to be a compliment?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, is that supposed to be a compliment?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, is that supposed to be a compliment?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is. Characters like that, surprisingly, never betray expectations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is. Characters like that, surprisingly, never betray expectations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is. Characters like that, surprisingly, never betray expectations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mine, in particular.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mine, in particular.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mine, in particular.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Pfft!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Pfft!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Pfft!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahahahaha...! You really do see me clearly, don't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahahahaha...! You really do see me clearly, don't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahahahaha...! You really do see me clearly, don't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Interesting. But I don't come cheap, you know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Interesting. But I don't come cheap, you know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Interesting. But I don't come cheap, you know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to tempt me, you'll need to offer something rather enticing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to tempt me, you'll need to offer something rather enticing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to tempt me, you'll need to offer something rather enticing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. If it's me, I can stage the situation you desire most.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. If it's me, I can stage the situation you desire most.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. If it's me, I can stage the situation you desire most.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The situation I desire?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The situation I desire?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The situation I desire?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what might that be? I'm growing quite curious about what our scriptwriter has prepared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what might that be? I'm growing quite curious about what our scriptwriter has prepared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what might that be? I'm growing quite curious about what our scriptwriter has prepared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What you desire is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What you desire is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What you desire is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The mutual destruction of the Society and the Order, or damage severe enough to rival it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The mutual destruction of the Society and the Order, or damage severe enough to rival it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The mutual destruction of the Society and the Order, or damage severe enough to rival it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That would leave both sides immobilized for quite some time, wouldn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That would leave both sides immobilized for quite some time, wouldn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That would leave both sides immobilized for quite some time, wouldn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well then, are you feeling inclined to take the role now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well then, are you feeling inclined to take the role now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well then, are you feeling inclined to take the role now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dean Abigail?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dean Abigail?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dean Abigail?

root.m_Talk_FRA: I prepared for the pilgrimage, following the guidance of revelation, and poured so much time and effort into it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And this is how it ends...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And this is how it ends...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And this is how it ends...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: My wounds are not healing anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My wounds are not healing anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My wounds are not healing anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have the Replacer enhancements reached their limit?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have the Replacer enhancements reached their limit?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have the Replacer enhancements reached their limit?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe. Well, if it weren't for this patchwork body, I'd have died screaming long ago...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe. Well, if it weren't for this patchwork body, I'd have died screaming long ago...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. Well, if it weren't for this patchwork body, I'd have died screaming long ago...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Heed my call, kin of the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Heed my call, kin of the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Heed my call, kin of the Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The salvation I have been looking for... Was it all for naught?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The salvation I have been looking for... Was it all for naught?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The salvation I have been looking for... Was it all for naught?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believed it was an irreversible fate, so I carried out my design.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believed it was an irreversible fate, so I carried out my design.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believed it was an irreversible fate, so I carried out my design.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The guidance of revelation led me here, and so I could walk any path of thorns.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The guidance of revelation led me here, and so I could walk any path of thorns.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The guidance of revelation led me here, and so I could walk any path of thorns.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But now that I've lost the god's vessel, the ritual is no longer possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But now that I've lost the god's vessel, the ritual is no longer possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But now that I've lost the god's vessel, the ritual is no longer possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How utterly futile. Is this pilgrimage to end here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How utterly futile. Is this pilgrimage to end here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How utterly futile. Is this pilgrimage to end here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your Eminence, perhaps I...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your Eminence, perhaps I...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your Eminence, perhaps I...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Father... Constantine...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Father... Constantine...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Father... Constantine...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It really is you, Father Constantine...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It really is you, Father Constantine...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It really is you, Father Constantine...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So it truly is you, Father Constantine...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So it truly is you, Father Constantine...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So it truly is you, Father Constantine...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, was it really you who caused what happened in Charade...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, was it really you who caused what happened in Charade...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, was it really you who caused what happened in Charade...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why would you do something so terrible...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why would you do something so terrible...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why would you do something so terrible...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Claudia... Nelson...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Claudia... Nelson...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Claudia... Nelson...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why... are you...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why... are you...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why... are you...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Answer me! You should have lost your ability and been excluded from the sacred mission. Why are you here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Answer me! You should have lost your ability and been excluded from the sacred mission. Why are you here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Answer me! You should have lost your ability and been excluded from the sacred mission. Why are you here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Surely... The Investigation Council said they weren't bringing you...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Surely... The Investigation Council said they weren't bringing you...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Surely... The Investigation Council said they weren't bringing you...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Doubt until thou cannot doubt any more. Cardinal Johan's teaching.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Doubt until thou cannot doubt any more. Cardinal Johan's teaching.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Doubt until thou cannot doubt any more. Cardinal Johan's teaching.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I came because I wanted to hear it from you, Father. Not from anyone else.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I came because I wanted to hear it from you, Father. Not from anyone else.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I came because I wanted to hear it from you, Father. Not from anyone else.

root.m_Talk_ENG: H-hear it from me...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: H-hear it from me...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: H-hear it from me...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Father I know would never do something like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Father I know would never do something like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Father I know would never do something like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're kind enough to make gravestones for dead pagans.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're kind enough to make gravestones for dead pagans.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're kind enough to make gravestones for dead pagans.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was sure there had to be some <color=#ffd34c>reason</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was sure there had to be some <color=#ffd34c>reason</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was sure there had to be some <color=#ffd34c>reason</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I still believe that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I still believe that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I still believe that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So please, tell me, Father.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So please, tell me, Father.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So please, tell me, Father.

root.m_SubTitle_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Do not fear, faithful attendant who follows Him.</color>
root.m_Talk_ENG: Why would you do this... even if it meant being wounded like this?
root.m_SubTitle_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Do not fear, faithful attendant who follows Him.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why would you do this... even if it meant being wounded like this?
root.m_SubTitle_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Do not fear, faithful attendant who follows Him.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why would you do this... even if it meant being wounded like this?

root.m_SubTitle_ENG: <color=#ff3636>This cup was prepared by the One who watches over the rise and fall of the world, for you blind ones.</color>
root.m_Talk_ENG: Why would you sacrifice others... even if it means being hated by everyone?
root.m_SubTitle_DEU: <color=#ff3636>This cup was prepared by the One who watches over the rise and fall of the world, for you blind ones.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why would you sacrifice others... even if it means being hated by everyone?
root.m_SubTitle_FRA: <color=#ff3636>This cup was prepared by the One who watches over the rise and fall of the world, for you blind ones.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why would you sacrifice others... even if it means being hated by everyone?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why... would you abandon your faith in the Lord, and kill His Eminence...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why... would you abandon your faith in the Lord, and kill His Eminence...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why... would you abandon your faith in the Lord, and kill His Eminence...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please answer me, Father.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please answer me, Father.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please answer me, Father.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you truly...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you truly...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you truly...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hehe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hehe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hehe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Father Constantine...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Father Constantine...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Father Constantine...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Keke! Why?!! Just whyyy...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Keke! Why?!! Just whyyy...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Keke! Why?!! Just whyyy...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: O God! This fate you have arranged is truly cruel!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: O God! This fate you have arranged is truly cruel!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: O God! This fate you have arranged is truly cruel!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You saw through my lingering attachment from the very beginning...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You saw through my lingering attachment from the very beginning...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You saw through my lingering attachment from the very beginning...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You must have known I was bound by it, enough to prepare another vessel...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You must have known I was bound by it, enough to prepare another vessel...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You must have known I was bound by it, enough to prepare another vessel...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
And yet you...! You wretched

And yet you...! You wretched

Is this the contrived tragedy you demand of me 8

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like the one who tried to offer up his own son by his own hand...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like the one who tried to offer up his own son by his own hand...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like the one who tried to offer up his own son by his own hand...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you truly wish me to kill that noble, pure maiden with my own hands, and make her the sacrifice...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you truly wish me to kill that noble, pure maiden with my own hands, and make her the sacrifice...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you truly wish me to kill that noble, pure maiden with my own hands, and make her the sacrifice...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop this at once, betrayer...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop this at once, betrayer...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop this at once, betrayer...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Claudia...? Why are you here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Claudia...? Why are you here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Claudia...? Why are you here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We must stop him. If he goes any further, there'll be no turning back!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We must stop him. If he goes any further, there'll be no turning back!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We must stop him. If he goes any further, there'll be no turning back!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know! Damn it, I know...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know! Damn it, I know...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know! Damn it, I know...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. If this is your trial...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. If this is your trial...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. If this is your trial...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then as you wish, I will become the clown and dance in this ridiculous tragedy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then as you wish, I will become the clown and dance in this ridiculous tragedy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then as you wish, I will become the clown and dance in this ridiculous tragedy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: F-Father...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: F-Father...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: F-Father...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: According to the guidance of revelation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: According to the guidance of revelation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: According to the guidance of revelation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With this, I shall bring this long, long pilgrimage to an end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With this, I shall bring this long, long pilgrimage to an end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With this, I shall bring this long, long pilgrimage to an end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No...! Stop! Stop it...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No...! Stop! Stop it...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No...! Stop! Stop it...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Amen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Amen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Amen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Entering safe mode.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Entering safe mode.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Entering safe mode.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Data-corruption firewall active. Limited runtime: 13 seconds.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Data-corruption firewall active. Limited runtime: 13 seconds.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Data-corruption firewall active. Limited runtime: 13 seconds.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Executing contingency protocol for Fate interference - OMEN.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Executing contingency protocol for Fate interference - OMEN.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Executing contingency protocol for Fate interference - OMEN.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Loading memories stored on this Terrabrain terminal.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Loading memories stored on this Terrabrain terminal.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Loading memories stored on this Terrabrain terminal.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Omen Protocol <color=#ffd34c>Activated</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: Omen Protocol <color=#ffd34c>Activated</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: Omen Protocol <color=#ffd34c>Activated</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Indeed... It's a bit noisy tonight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Indeed... It's a bit noisy tonight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Indeed... It's a bit noisy tonight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no need to worry. The stage has merely finished Act One.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no need to worry. The stage has merely finished Act One.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no need to worry. The stage has merely finished Act One.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once this intermission ends and the curtain rises on the next act, it will grow far more tumultuous than this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once this intermission ends and the curtain rises on the next act, it will grow far more tumultuous than this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once this intermission ends and the curtain rises on the next act, it will grow far more tumultuous than this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, was it called the <color=#ffd34c>omen</color> phenomenon?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, was it called the <color=#ffd34c>omen</color> phenomenon?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, was it called the <color=#ffd34c>omen</color> phenomenon?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A phenomenon where an unforeseen existence intervenes in reality by unforeseen means.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A phenomenon where an unforeseen existence intervenes in reality by unforeseen means.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A phenomenon where an unforeseen existence intervenes in reality by unforeseen means.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the Old Administration's protocol prepared in response to it...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the Old Administration's protocol prepared in response to it...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the Old Administration's protocol prepared in response to it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, how does our lovely young lady happen to know such things?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, how does our lovely young lady happen to know such things?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, how does our lovely young lady happen to know such things?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How I know isn't what matters, is it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How I know isn't what matters, is it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How I know isn't what matters, is it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just as a character on stage has no need to know what lies beyond it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just as a character on stage has no need to know what lies beyond it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just as a character on stage has no need to know what lies beyond it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, who knows? I may not know much about the stage, but this is my monastery, you see?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, who knows? I may not know much about the stage, but this is my monastery, you see?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, who knows? I may not know much about the stage, but this is my monastery, you see?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I would appreciate it if you observed the appropriate decorum and courtesy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I would appreciate it if you observed the appropriate decorum and courtesy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I would appreciate it if you observed the appropriate decorum and courtesy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gladly, Agnes Abigail.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gladly, Agnes Abigail.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gladly, Agnes Abigail.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is an honor for me as well, to be invited to the Society's estate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is an honor for me as well, to be invited to the Society's estate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is an honor for me as well, to be invited to the Society's estate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even for someone like me, stepping foot here so casually is no easy matter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even for someone like me, stepping foot here so casually is no easy matter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even for someone like me, stepping foot here so casually is no easy matter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An invitation from a dean is the quickest way, after all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: An invitation from a dean is the quickest way, after all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: An invitation from a dean is the quickest way, after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my, you make it sound as though you've tried before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my, you make it sound as though you've tried before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my, you make it sound as though you've tried before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? I'd like to hear the real reason you're here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? I'd like to hear the real reason you're here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? I'd like to hear the real reason you're here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My business is quite simple. I would like to cast you in my script.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My business is quite simple. I would like to cast you in my script.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My business is quite simple. I would like to cast you in my script.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, cast me...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, cast me...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, cast me...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're not about to ask me to take the stage myself, are you? That sounds like a lot of work.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're not about to ask me to take the stage myself, are you? That sounds like a lot of work.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're not about to ask me to take the stage myself, are you? That sounds like a lot of work.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not a bad offer for you either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not a bad offer for you either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not a bad offer for you either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: More than anything, I happen to like characters such as yourself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: More than anything, I happen to like characters such as yourself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: More than anything, I happen to like characters such as yourself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those who wear a mask of gentleness, yet are selfish, calculating, and ruthlessly cold beneath it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those who wear a mask of gentleness, yet are selfish, calculating, and ruthlessly cold beneath it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those who wear a mask of gentleness, yet are selfish, calculating, and ruthlessly cold beneath it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, is that supposed to be a compliment?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, is that supposed to be a compliment?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, is that supposed to be a compliment?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is. Characters like that, surprisingly, never betray expectations.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is. Characters like that, surprisingly, never betray expectations.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is. Characters like that, surprisingly, never betray expectations.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mine, in particular.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mine, in particular.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mine, in particular.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Pfft!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Pfft!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Pfft!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahahahaha...! You really do see me clearly, don't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahahahaha...! You really do see me clearly, don't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahahahaha...! You really do see me clearly, don't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Interesting. But I don't come cheap, you know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Interesting. But I don't come cheap, you know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Interesting. But I don't come cheap, you know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to tempt me, you'll need to offer something rather enticing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to tempt me, you'll need to offer something rather enticing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to tempt me, you'll need to offer something rather enticing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. If it's me, I can stage the situation you desire most.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. If it's me, I can stage the situation you desire most.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. If it's me, I can stage the situation you desire most.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The situation I desire?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The situation I desire?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The situation I desire?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And what might that be? I'm growing quite curious about what our scriptwriter has prepared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And what might that be? I'm growing quite curious about what our scriptwriter has prepared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And what might that be? I'm growing quite curious about what our scriptwriter has prepared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What you desire is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: What you desire is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: What you desire is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The mutual destruction of the Society and the Order, or damage severe enough to rival it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The mutual destruction of the Society and the Order, or damage severe enough to rival it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The mutual destruction of the Society and the Order, or damage severe enough to rival it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That would leave both sides immobilized for quite some time, wouldn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That would leave both sides immobilized for quite some time, wouldn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That would leave both sides immobilized for quite some time, wouldn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well then, are you feeling inclined to take the role now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well then, are you feeling inclined to take the role now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well then, are you feeling inclined to take the role now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dean Abigail?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dean Abigail?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dean Abigail?
